scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/css dist/js dist/img && cp v2-2.html dist/index.html && cp index.html dist/index-v1.html && cp v2.html dist/ && cp v4.html dist/ && cp v4-redesign.html dist/ && cp v2-2.html dist/ && cp ea-training.html dist/ && cp about.html dist/ && cp wall-of-love.html dist/ && cp thank-you.html dist/ && cp terms.html dist/ && cp favicon.jpg dist/ && cp -r img/. dist/img/ 2>/dev/null; npx lightningcss --minify css/styles.css -o dist/css/styles.css && npx terser js/main.js -o dist/js/main.js --compress --mangle && npx terser js/thank-you.js -o dist/js/thank-you.js --compress --mangle
